## TC-1-01: Successful login with valid admin credentials

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **ID** | TC-1-01 |
| **Requirement** | #1 — User Login — Secure Bank |
| **Priority** | P1 |
| **Type** | Functional |
| **Automated** | Yes — `tests/generated/secure-bank-login.spec.ts` |
| **Status** | Draft |

### Preconditions
- [ ] User is on `https://qaplayground.com/bank`
- [ ] System is in logged-out state

### Steps
| # | Action | Test Data | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------|----------------|
| 1 | Navigate to `/bank` | — | Login form is visible |
| 2 | Enter username | `admin` | Field accepts input |
| 3 | Enter password | `admin123` | Field accepts input |
| 4 | Click Login button | — | Redirected to dashboard |
